0.text: Minimal atelectasis in the medial aspect of the right middle lobe

1.text: Fibrotic changes in the medial aspect of the right middle lobe

2.text: Focal ground glass opacities in the posterobasal region of the right lower lobe

3.text: Focal ground glass opacities extending to the upper lobe adjacent to the minor fissure

4.text: Fibrotic densities in the lower lobes bilaterally
